overall.assessment: Visoko usklađen sekularni sadržaj koji kroz poduzetničku etiku i konkretnu solidarnost (Petrinja) zrcali kršćanske vrijednosti.
seeds_of_logos: Afirmacija dostojanstva rada kroz gastronomiju kao služenje
Radikalna solidarnost i supsidijarnost iskazana u humanitarnom angažmanu nakon potresa
Inzistiranje na poštenju i integritetu u poslovanju i medijskom prostoru
Promicanje općeg dobra kroz projekt 'Best Food Croatia'
concerns: Nedostatak eksplicitne duhovne dimenzije rada (ora et labora)
Potencijalni rizik svođenja ljudske osobe na ekonomski subjekt u turističkom kontekstu
overall.theological_context: Dostojanstvo rada (Laborem Exercens), solidarnost i opće dobro.

sections.subtitle: Od 'Gastro Ambasadora' do vizije Best Food Croatia
sections.screenshot_description: Domagoj Delač objašnjava koncept 'Gastro Ambasadora' i platforme Best Food Croatia.
sections.content: Domagoj Delač, poznat kao 'Gastro Ambasador', u uvodu podcasta objašnjava da to nije samo nadimak, već **brand** koji gradi sa svojim timom na platformi Best Food Croatia. Ističe da je on sam prvi brand te gastro platforme, čija je svrha spajanje hrane i zanimljivih gostiju u jedinstven podcast format. Kroz emisiju, Domagoj obilazi najbolje restorane, nudeći gledateljima uvid u gastronomsku scenu na opušten i zanimljiv način. Njegov osobni put, obilježen brojnim usponima i padovima, doveo ga je do spoznaje da želi pronaći stabilnost i sreću u poslu koji voli. Nakon godina bavljenja marketingom, prodajom i putovanjima, te života u četiri različita grada u samo godinu dana, Domagoj je shvatio da želi mir i stabilnost. Ideja za Best Food Croatia rodila se iz želje da snima restorane, kombinirajući svoje znanje o marketingu, ugostiteljstvu i kuhanju. Prva gošća, Anja Alavanja, s kojom ga veže dugogodišnje prijateljstvo, potvrdila je uspješnost koncepta spajanja hrane i poznatih osoba. Do sada je snimljeno 15-16 epizoda, fokusiranih na renomirane zagrebačke restorane, s ciljem da se vrhunska gastronomija približi široj publici i razbije predrasude o nedostupnosti.

magisterium.assessment: Poduzetnička vizija promocije nacionalne baštine kroz hranu.
concerns: Opasnost od svođenja napretka isključivo na ekonomsku i tehničku sferu.
magisterium.enrichment: Istinski razvoj mora uključivati moralnu prosudbu i autentično ljudsko dobro.
magisterium.assessment_en: Entrepreneurial vision of promotion of national heritage through food.
magisterium.enrichment_en: True development must include moral judgment and authentic human good.
concerns_en: Danger of reducing progress exclusively to the economic and technical sphere.

sections.subtitle_en: From 'Gastro Ambassador' to the vision of Best Food Croatia
sections.screenshot_description_en: Domagoj Delač explains the concept of 'Gastro Ambassadors' and the Best Food Croatia platform.
sections.content_en: Domagoj Delač, known as 'Gastro Ambassador', explains in the podcast's introduction that it is not just a nickname, but a **brand** he is building with his team on the Best Food Croatia platform. He points out that he himself is the first brand of that gastro platform, whose purpose is to connect food and interesting guests in a unique podcast format. Through the show, Domagoj visits the best restaurants, offering viewers insight into the gastronomic scene in a relaxed and interesting way. His personal journey, marked by numerous ups and downs, led him to the realization that he wants to find stability and happiness in the work he loves. After years of dealing with marketing, sales, and travel, and living in four different cities in just one year, Domagoj realized that he wants peace and stability. The idea for Best Food Croatia was born from the desire to film restaurants, combining his knowledge of marketing, hospitality, and cooking. The first guest, Anja Alavanja, with whom he shares a long-standing friendship, confirmed the success of the concept of combining food and famous personalities. So far, 15-16 episodes have been filmed, focused on renowned Zagreb restaurants, with the aim of bringing high-end gastronomy closer to a wider audience and breaking down prejudices about inaccessibility.

sections.subtitle: Ljubav prema ugostiteljstvu i irsko iskustvo: Od Glenlo Abbeyja do Ed Sheerana
sections.screenshot_description: Domagoj Delač prepričava anegdotu o susretu s Edom Sheeranom u Irskoj.
sections.content:
Koncept Best Food Croatia, kako Domagoj objašnjava, usmjeren je na promociju restorana diljem Hrvatske, prepoznajući je kao turističku zemlju s ugostiteljstvom u krvi. Njegova osobna povezanost s ugostiteljstvom seže u djetinjstvo, budući da je odrastao u blizini Tkalčićeve ulice, poznate po brojnim ugostiteljskim objektima. Iako mu marketing ostaje primarna djelatnost, ugostiteljstvo je uvijek bilo prisutno kao dodatni izvor prihoda i mjesto okupljanja prijatelja. Domagoj ističe da je Best Food Croatia u kratkom vremenu ostvarila značajan napredak, privlačeći restorane i goste. 

Posebno zanimljivo poglavlje u Domagojevom životu je iskustvo rada u Irskoj, gdje je nakon osobnih turbulencija otišao 'maknuti se od svega'. Zaposlio se u hotelu Glenlo Abbey, luksuznom objektu s pet zvjezdica, koji je tri godine zaredom proglašen najboljim hotelom u Irskoj. U samo tri mjeseca napredovao je do pozicije 'late operational managera'. Tijekom boravka u Irskoj, susreo se s brojnim poznatim osobama, uključujući glazbenika Eda Sheerana, kojeg, kako priznaje, u početku nije prepoznao, misleći da je 'lokalni crveni dečko'. S druge strane, prepoznao je glumca Schillingera iz serije 'Oz'. Ovo irsko iskustvo potvrdilo mu je vlastitu vrijednost i sposobnost snalaženja u novom okruženju, iako mu je nedostajao Zagreb i hrvatska kultura.

magisterium.assessment: Iskustvo rada u inozemstvu kao put osobnog i profesionalnog rasta.
magisterium.enrichment: Rad u institucijama treba svjedočiti integritet i poštivanje zahtjeva pravednosti.
magisterium.assessment_en: Experience of working abroad as a path of personal and professional growth.
magisterium.enrichment_en: Work in institutions should testify to integrity and respect for the demands of justice.

sections.subtitle_en: Love for hospitality and Irish experience: From Glenlo Abbey to Ed Sheeran
sections.screenshot_description_en: Domagoj Delač recounts an anecdote about meeting Ed Sheeran in Ireland.
sections.content_en: The concept of Best Food Croatia, as Domagoj explains, is aimed at promoting restaurants throughout Croatia, recognizing it as a tourist country with hospitality in its blood. His personal connection with hospitality dates back to childhood, as he grew up near Tkalčićeva Street, known for its numerous hospitality establishments. Although marketing remains his primary activity, hospitality has always been present as an additional source of income and a place for friends to gather. Domagoj points out that Best Food Croatia has achieved significant progress in a short time, attracting restaurants and guests. A particularly interesting chapter in Domagoj's life is the experience of working in Ireland, where, after personal turbulences, he went 'to get away from everything'. He got a job at the Glenlo Abbey hotel, a luxurious five-star establishment, which was declared the best hotel in Ireland three years in a row. In just three months, he advanced to the position of 'late operational manager'. During his stay in Ireland, he met numerous famous people, including musician Ed Sheeran, whom, as he admits, he initially did not recognize, thinking he was 'a local red boy'. On the other hand, he recognized actor Schillinger from the series 'Oz'. This Irish experience confirmed his own worth and ability to adapt in a new environment, although he missed Zagreb and Croatian culture.

sections.subtitle: Hrvatska gastronomska scena i viralni 'Mljevenici': Inovacija i marketing
sections.screenshot_description: Domagoj Delač objašnjava priču iza 'Mljevenika' i njihovog viralnog uspjeha.
sections.content:
Kada je riječ o hrvatskoj gastronomskoj sceni, Domagoj Delač ističe da je ona bogata i raznolika, predstavljajući spoj talijanske, mađarske, njemačke i turske kuhinje, uz autentična domaća jela. Smatra da je ta raznolikost naša prednost, omogućujući uživanje u vrhunskim ćevapima, bolonjezu, bečkom odresku i drugim specijalitetima. Međutim, upozorava na pad kvalitete hrane u turističkim centrima, navodeći primjer prepečenih ćevapčića u Makarskoj. 

U tom kontekstu, Domagoj je osmislio 'Mljevenike', koji su postali pravi marketinški hit. Mljevenici su zapravo ćevapčići s modificiranom recepturom – dodao je janjeću masnoću junetini, stvarajući jedinstven okus. Naziv 'Mljevenici' bio je marketinški trik kako bi se jelo razlikovalo od klasičnih ćevapčića i privuklo pažnju. Kampanja je brzo postala viralna, privukavši medijsku pozornost Večernjeg lista, RTL-a, Indexa, te televizijskih kuća iz Bosne i Srbije. 

Viralnost 'Mljevenika' kulminirala je pojavljivanjem u popularnom kvizu 'Potjera', gdje je Doris Pinčić točno odgovorila na pitanje o njima. Doris je kasnije posjetila Domagojev restoran, potvrđujući autentičnost priče. Domagoj ističe da je ponosan na ovaj uspjeh i da je zaštitio ime i recepturu 'Mljevenika', s planovima za masovnu proizvodnju i plasman kroz trgovačke lance u budućnosti. Kroz ovaj projekt, Domagoj je spojio svoju ljubav prema kuhanju i marketinške vještine, stvarajući nešto što ga opušta i veseli.

magisterium.assessment: Fokus na inovaciju i marketing u gastronomiji.
concerns: Rizik od komercijalizacije koja zanemaruje dublje društvene vrijednosti.
magisterium.enrichment: Gospodarska aktivnost treba služiti općem dobru, a ne samo privatnom bogaćenju.
magisterium.assessment_en: Focus on innovation and marketing in gastronomy.
magisterium.enrichment_en: Economic activity should serve the common good, and not just private enrichment.
concerns_en: Risk of commercialization which neglects deeper social values.

sections.subtitle_en: Croatian gastronomic scene and viral 'Mljevenici': Innovation and marketing
sections.screenshot_description_en: Domagoj Delač explains the story behind 'Mljevenika' and their viral success.
sections.content_en: When it comes to the Croatian gastronomic scene, Domagoj Delač points out that it is rich and diverse, representing a blend of Italian, Hungarian, German, and Turkish cuisine, along with authentic local dishes. He believes that this diversity is our advantage, allowing enjoyment of excellent ćevapi, bolognese, Wiener schnitzel, and other specialties. However, he warns of a decline in food quality in tourist centers, citing the example of overcooked ćevapčići in Makarska. In this context, Domagoj devised 'Mljevenici', which became a real marketing hit. Mljevenici are actually ćevapčići with a modified recipe – he added lamb fat to beef, creating a unique taste. The name 'Mljevenici' was a marketing trick to differentiate the dish from classic ćevapčići and attract attention. The campaign quickly went viral, attracting media attention from Večernji list, RTL, Index, and television companies from Bosnia and Serbia. The viral nature of 'Mljevenici' culminated in their appearance on the popular quiz show 'Potjera', where Doris Pinčić correctly answered a question about them. Doris later visited Domagoj's restaurant, confirming the authenticity of the story. Domagoj emphasizes that he is proud of this success and that he has protected the name and recipe of 'Mljevenici', with plans for mass production and placement through retail chains in the future. Through this project, Domagoj combined his love for cooking and marketing skills, creating something that relaxes and delights him.

sections.subtitle: Političke ambicije i izazovi hrvatskog turizma: Cijene, kvaliteta i radna snaga
sections.screenshot_description: Domagoj Delač raspravlja o cijenama u hrvatskom turizmu i problemima s radnom snagom.
sections.content:
Domagoj Delač otvoreno govori o svojim dugoročnim ambicijama u politici, iako priznaje da je to kompleksno područje. Njegov otac ga je upozorio da je 'prepošten' za politiku, no Domagoj vjeruje u krajnji cilj i nesebično djelovanje za dobrobit zajednice. 

U kontekstu hrvatskog turizma, Domagoj se osvrće na često postavljano pitanje o visokim cijenama. Smatra da problem nije nužno u samim cijenama, već u **kvaliteti usluge** koja se za te cijene nudi. Uspoređujući Hrvatsku s Irskom i Amerikom, ističe da su cijene u Hrvatskoj konkurentne, ali da je konverzija na euro stvorila percepciju veće skupoće. Naglašava da Hrvatska privlači goste veće platežne moći, kojima treba ponuditi autentično iskustvo, a ne samo more. Hrvatska, prema njegovom mišljenju, prodaje 'doživljaje' – od Plitvičkih jezera do Skradinskog buka, nudeći raznolikost na malom prostoru. 

Veliki problem u ugostiteljstvu predstavlja **radna snaga**. Domagoj je, kao bivši vlasnik restorana, imao loša iskustva s domaćim radnicima koji su bili nepouzdani. Suprotno tome, iznosi pozitivna iskustva s radnicima iz Bangladeša i Filipina, s kojima je radio u lancu restorana diljem Europe. Ti su radnici bili marljivi, ljubazni i spremni na prekovremeni rad, što je rijetkost kod domaće radne snage. Zaključuje da Hrvatska nije preskupa, ali da se za novac mora pružiti odgovarajuća usluga, što zahtijeva bolju organizaciju i pozitivan pristup.

magisterium.assessment: Analiza izazova turizma, cijena i kvalitete radne snage.
concerns: Potreba za pravednim odnosom prema radnicima u uslužnom sektoru.
magisterium.enrichment: Crkva poziva na pravednost prema onima koji rade u uslužnim djelatnostima.
magisterium.assessment_en: Analysis of challenges of tourism, prices and quality of workforce.
magisterium.enrichment_en: The Church calls for justice towards those who work in service industries.
concerns_en: Need for a just relationship towards workers in the service sector.

sections.subtitle_en: Political ambitions and challenges of Croatian tourism: Prices, quality and workforce
sections.screenshot_description_en: Domagoj Delač discusses prices in Croatian tourism and problems with the workforce.
sections.content_en: Domagoj Delač openly speaks about his long-term ambitions in politics, although he admits that it is a complex area. His father warned him that he is 'too honest' for politics, but Domagoj believes in the ultimate goal and selfless action for the good of the community. In the context of Croatian tourism, Domagoj refers to the frequently asked question about high prices. He believes that the problem is not necessarily in the prices themselves, but in the **quality of service** offered for those prices. Comparing Croatia with Ireland and America, he points out that prices in Croatia are competitive, but that the conversion to the euro created a perception of greater expensiveness. He emphasizes that Croatia attracts guests with greater purchasing power, to whom an authentic experience should be offered, and not just the sea. Croatia, in his opinion, sells 'experiences' – from Plitvice Lakes to Skradinski Buk, offering diversity in a small area. A big problem in hospitality is **labor**. Domagoj, as a former restaurant owner, had bad experiences with domestic workers who were unreliable. In contrast, he presents positive experiences with workers from Bangladesh and the Philippines, with whom he worked in a chain of restaurants across Europe. These workers were diligent, kind, and ready for overtime work, which is a rarity among domestic labor. He concludes that Croatia is not too expensive, but that for the money, an appropriate service must be provided, which requires better organization and a positive approach.

sections.subtitle: Kako odabrati restoran i važnost pozitivnog pristupa u promociji
sections.screenshot_description: Domagoj Delač daje savjete za odabir restorana, ističući važnost čistoće WC-a.
sections.content:
Domagoj Delač nudi praktične savjete za odabir restorana, ističući da se u današnje vrijeme treba osloniti na online recenzije. Iako recenzije nisu uvijek sto posto točne, ocjena između četiri i pet zvjezdica dobar je pokazatelj kvalitete. Posebno naglašava važnost **čistoće toaleta (WC-a)** kao ključnog indikatora kvalitete restorana: 'Ako je WC baš katastrofa, onda mogu misliti kakve su neke druge stvari.' Drugi dobar pokazatelj je gužva u restoranu, slijedeći logiku 'gdje jedu kamiondžije'. 

Njegova emisija Best Food Croatia upravo je preporuka, a Domagoj se svjesno odlučuje za **pozitivan pristup** u promociji. Odbija kritizirati restorane, uspoređujući svoj stil s Milkom Babović, koja je živopisnim opisima prenosila emocije. Njegov cilj je prenijeti miris, okus, teksturu i atmosferu, a ne graditi sadržaj na negativnosti. Iako priznaje da bi negativan sadržaj možda brže postao viralan, vjeruje da 'na pozitivi posao traje dugoročnije'. Želi promovirati i 'skrivene dragulje' hrvatske gastronomije, mjesta koja su podcijenjena, ali nude izvanredno iskustvo. 

Kritizira lokalne vlasti zbog iznajmljivanja atraktivnih lokacija nekompetentnim pojedincima, što rezultira lošom uslugom. Smatra da bi se, čak i ako se lokacije iznajmljuju 'šogorima', trebalo osigurati da se tamo otvori dobar restoran. Također, ističe nedostatak autentičnih hrvatskih restorana u Zagrebu i predlaže **inovacije u tradicionalnoj kuhinji**, poput elegantno poslužene sarme u manjim porcijama, kako bi se privukli turisti i valorizirala bogata hrvatska baština.

magisterium.assessment: Lifestyle savjeti o odabiru restorana i pozitivnoj promociji.
concerns: Pretežito svjetovni pristup usmjeren na potrošačku kulturu.
magisterium.enrichment: Potrošnja ne smije postati jedini cilj koji priječi ljudski rast.
magisterium.assessment_en: Lifestyle tips about choosing restaurants and positive promotion.
magisterium.enrichment_en: Consumption must not become the only goal which hinders human growth.
concerns_en: Predominantly secular approach focused on consumer culture.

sections.subtitle_en: How to choose a restaurant and the importance of a positive approach in promotion
sections.screenshot_description_en: Domagoj Delač gives advice for choosing a restaurant, emphasizing the importance of toilet cleanliness.
sections.content_en: Domagoj Delač offers practical advice for choosing a restaurant, emphasizing that nowadays one should rely on online reviews. Although reviews are not always one hundred percent accurate, a rating between four and five stars is a good indicator of quality. He particularly emphasizes the importance of **toilet (WC) cleanliness** as a key indicator of restaurant quality: 'If the WC is really a disaster, then I can imagine what some other things are like.' Another good indicator is the crowd in the restaurant, following the logic 'where truckers eat'. His show Best Food Croatia is precisely a recommendation, and Domagoj consciously opts for a **positive approach** in promotion. He refuses to criticize restaurants, comparing his style to Milka Babović, who conveyed emotions with vivid descriptions. His goal is to convey the smell, taste, texture, and atmosphere, and not to build content on negativity. Although he admits that negative content might go viral faster, he believes that 'on positivity, the work lasts longer term'. He also wants to promote 'hidden gems' of Croatian gastronomy, places that are underrated but offer an extraordinary experience. He criticizes local authorities for renting out attractive locations to incompetent individuals, which results in poor service. He believes that, even if locations are rented out to 'brothers-in-law', it should be ensured that a good restaurant opens there. Also, he points out the lack of authentic Croatian restaurants in Zagreb and suggests **innovations in traditional cuisine**, such as elegantly served sarma in smaller portions, to attract tourists and valorize rich Croatian heritage.

iterations.theme_en: From 'Gastro Ambassador' to the challenges of Croatian gastronomy and tourism

iterations.theme: Humanitarni rad, politička razmišljanja i budućnost projekta

sections.subtitle: Od krumpira do koordinatora: Domagojevo iskustvo u Petrinji
sections.screenshot_description: Domagoj Delač opisuje svoje iskustvo kao koordinatora nakon potresa u Petrinji, s naglaskom na organizacijske vještine i humanitarni rad.
sections.content:
Domagoj Delač prisjetio se svog angažmana nakon razornog potresa u Petrinji, ističući da mu to nije bio prvi put da se odaziva na humanitarne akcije. Prethodno je sudjelovao u pomoći nakon požara u Splitu i poplava u Rajevu Selu. Iako je prvotno došao kao volonter spreman guliti krumpire, njegove organizacijske sposobnosti brzo su prepoznate. U roku od samo četiri sata, od dolaska u Petrinju do sastanka s gradonačelnikom, Domagoj je preuzeo ulogu glavnog koordinatora. Smatrao je da je korisniji u organizaciji nego u fizičkom radu, što je potvrdio i njegov brzi uspon.  

Njegova uloga uključivala je koordinaciju između **Crvenog križa**, **Hrvatske vojske**, **gradskog poglavarstva** i drugih aktera. Posebno je istaknuo suradnju s **Marinom Medakom** iz Hrvatske udruge ugostitelja i Hrvatske udruge poduzetnika. Domagoj je čak sudjelovao na sjednici **Nacionalnog vijeća za potrese i pandemiju** u petrinjskoj vojarni, zajedno s predsjednikom i premijerom.  

Jedan od najupečatljivijih trenutaka bio je onaj kada je, nakon cjelodnevnog rada i gladi, doživio snažan naknadni potres. U tom trenutku, dok je pokušavao pojesti prvi ozbiljan obrok, izgovorio je legendarnu rečenicu: "Ti ćeš meni ručak!" Ta snimka, koju je zabilježio njegov kolega Sanjin, postala je viralna. Domagoj naglašava kako je u takvim situacijama strah nestao, a prevladala je ljudskost i želja za pomoći. Kroz ovo iskustvo, shvatio je da mediji nisu nešto čega se treba bojati te da ima mnogo toga za ponuditi i ispričati.
entities: Nacionalno vijeće za potrese i pandemiju

magisterium.assessment: Izravno svjedočanstvo solidarnosti i služenja potrebitima nakon potresa.
magisterium.enrichment: Služenje siromašnima i marginaliziranima je zahtjev vjere, a ne opcija.
magisterium.assessment_en: Direct testimony of solidarity and service to the needy after the earthquake.
magisterium.enrichment_en: Serving the poor and the marginalized is a requirement of faith, and not an option.

sections.subtitle_en: From potatoes to coordinator: Domagoj's experience in Petrinja
sections.screenshot_description_en: Domagoj Delač describes his experience as a coordinator after the earthquake in Petrinja, with an emphasis on organizational skills and humanitarian work.
sections.content_en: Domagoj Delač recalled his involvement after the devastating earthquake in Petrinja, emphasizing that it was not his first time responding to humanitarian actions. Previously, he participated in aid efforts after the fire in Split and floods in Rajevo Selo. Although he initially came as a volunteer ready to peel potatoes, his organizational skills were quickly recognized. Within just four hours, from his arrival in Petrinja to a meeting with the mayor, Domagoj took on the role of chief coordinator. He believed he was more useful in organization than in physical labor, which his rapid ascent confirmed. His role included coordination between the **Red Cross**, the **Croatian Army**, the **city administration**, and other stakeholders. He particularly highlighted cooperation with **Marin Medak** from the Croatian Association of Caterers and the Croatian Association of Entrepreneurs. Domagoj even participated in a session of the **National Council for Earthquakes and the Pandemic** in the Petrinja barracks, along with the president and prime minister. One of the most striking moments was when, after a full day of work and hunger, he experienced a strong aftershock. At that moment, while trying to eat his first serious meal, he uttered the legendary sentence: "You will give me lunch!" That recording, captured by his colleague Sanjin, went viral. Domagoj emphasizes that in such situations, fear disappeared, and humanity and the desire to help prevailed. Through this experience, he realized that media is not something to be afraid of and that he has much to offer and tell.
entities_en: National Council for Earthquakes and Pandemic

sections.subtitle: Politika, mediji i potraga za poštenjem: Domagojeva razmišljanja
sections.screenshot_description: Domagoj Delač razmišlja o izazovima bavljenja politikom i utjecaju medija na percepciju javnosti.
sections.content:
Iako ga politika zanima, Domagoj Delač izražava značajne rezerve prema ulasku u nju. Prisjeća se savjeta svog oca koji je govorio da su pošteni ljudi u politici pregaženi. Domagoj se pita hoće li narod cijeniti i valorizirati nesebičan rad za opće dobro, s obzirom na povijesna iskustva gdje su se pojedinci žrtvovali, a kasnije bili zaboravljeni ili neshvaćeni.  

Posebno ga brine uloga medija i politike u manipulaciji javnim mnijenjem. Ističe kako se dobre namjere lako mogu preformulirati u loše ako je to nekome u interesu. Kao primjer navodi **Winstona Churchilla**, koji je izgubio izbore nakon Drugog svjetskog rata unatoč svojoj ključnoj ulozi u pobjedi. Domagoj smatra da mediji i politika često stvaraju podjele, koristeći princip "zavadi pa vladaj", što se očituje i u odnosima između Hrvatske i Srbije.  

Unatoč tim izazovima, u Domagoju gori želja da se jednog dana angažira u politici, ali tek kada osjeti da ima povjerenje ljudi i da će njegov rad biti prepoznat. Vjeruje da je ključ u poštenju i upornosti, te da će kroz svoj rad kao gastro ambasador ljudi upoznati njegovu osobnost i sposobnosti.

magisterium.assessment: Snažna afirmacija integriteta i istine u javnom prostoru kao temelja pravednog društva.
magisterium.enrichment: Istina je opće dobro koje se ne umanjuje dijeljenjem; njezino promicanje u medijima ključno je za ljudsko dostojanstvo.
magisterium.assessment_en: Strong affirmation of integrity and truth in the public space as a foundation of a just society.
magisterium.enrichment_en: Truth is a common good which is not diminished by sharing; its promotion in the media is crucial for human dignity.

sections.subtitle_en: Politics, media and the search for honesty: Domagoj's reflections
sections.screenshot_description_en: Domagoj Delač reflects on the challenges of engaging in politics and the influence of media on public perception.
sections.content_en: Although politics interests him, Domagoj Delač expresses significant reservations about entering it. He recalls his father's advice who said that honest people in politics are run over. Domagoj wonders if the people will appreciate and value selfless work for the common good, given historical experiences where individuals sacrificed themselves, and were later forgotten or misunderstood. He is particularly concerned about the role of media and politics in manipulating public opinion. He points out how good intentions can easily be reformulated into bad ones if it is in someone's interest. As an example, he cites **Winston Churchill**, who lost the elections after World War II despite his key role in the victory. Domagoj believes that media and politics often create divisions, using the principle "divide and conquer", which is also evident in the relations between Croatia and Serbia. Despite these challenges, a desire burns in Domagoj to one day engage in politics, but only when he feels that he has the trust of the people and that his work will be recognized. He believes that the key is in honesty and perseverance, and that through his work as a gastro ambassador people will get to know his personality and abilities.

sections.subtitle: Od 'Kava Liberal' do susreta s Milanovićem: Kako je Domagoj potaknuo predsjedničku kandidaturu
sections.screenshot_description: Domagoj Delač priča o svom susretu sa Zoranom Milanovićem u svom kafiću 'Kako se šika' i kako ga je potaknuo na predsjedničku kandidaturu.
sections.content:
Domagoj Delač prisjetio se projekta **'Kava Liberal'**, političkog talk showa koji je organizirao u suradnji s novinarima **Igorom Borghettijem** i **Borisom Rašetom** iz **24sata** i **Expressa**. Emisija se održavala u njegovom tadašnjem kafiću **'Kako se šika'** na **Britanskom trgu** u Zagrebu. Kafić, uređen u umjetničkom i avangardnom stilu s antičkim namještajem i klavirom koji je služio kao stol, privukao je pažnju medija i bio je prepoznat kao jedno od najboljih mjesta u gradu.  

Prije 'Kava Liberal', Domagoj je u istom prostoru organizirao i talent show s pozornicom i žirijem u kojem su sjedili poznati poput **Jaje iz Jinxa** i urednika **Večernjeg lista**. Upravo su te organizacijske vještine i jedinstveni ambijent kafića privukli Borghettija i Rašetu, koji su željeli stvoriti drugačiji format političkog razgovora.  

Jedan od gostiju 'Kava Liberal' bio je tadašnji kandidat za predsjednika, **Zoran Milanović**. Domagoj je, kao organizator, imao priliku postaviti mu pitanje. Pitao ga je zašto se ne bi kandidirao za predsjednika, unatoč Milanovićevom tadašnjem stavu da je prestar za tu funkciju. Nakon emisije, Domagoj i Milanović su se povukli sa strane i popili pivo, gdje ga je Domagoj dodatno potaknuo na razmišljanje o kandidaturi. Istaknuo je potrebu za balansom između ljevice i desnice u Hrvatskoj te važnost iskusne figure poput Milanovića. Domagoj vjeruje da je tim razgovorom potaknuo Milanovića na razmišljanje, što je na kraju dovelo do njegove kandidature i pobjede na izborima.

magisterium.assessment: Anegdotalni prikaz političkog angažmana koji naglašava važnost sudjelovanja laika u javnom životu.
concerns: Potrebno je osigurati da politički angažman služi općem dobru, a ne samo partikularnim interesima ili pukoj promociji.
magisterium.enrichment: Politička participacija je moralna obveza i oblik ljubavi kada teži pravednom poretku i općem dobru.
magisterium.assessment_en: Anecdotal presentation of political engagement which emphasizes the importance of participation of laity in public life.
magisterium.enrichment_en: Political participation is a moral obligation and a form of love when it strives for a just order and the common good.
concerns_en: It is necessary to ensure that political engagement serves the common good, and not just particular interests or mere promotion.

sections.subtitle_en: From 'Kava Liberal' to meeting with Milanović: How Domagoj prompted the presidential candidacy
sections.screenshot_description_en: Domagoj Delač talks about his meeting with Zoran Milanović in his cafe 'Kako se šika' and how he encouraged him to run for president.
sections.content_en: Domagoj Delač recalled the project **'Kava Liberal'**, a political talk show which he organized in cooperation with journalists **Igor Borghetti** and **Boris Rašeta** from **24sata** and **Express**. The show was held in his then-cafe **'Kako se šika'** on **Britanski trg** in Zagreb. The cafe, decorated in an artistic and avant-garde style with antique furniture and a piano that served as a table, attracted media attention and was recognized as one of the best places in the city. Before 'Kava Liberal', Domagoj also organized a talent show in the same space with a stage and a jury in which well-known figures like **Jaje from Jinx** and the editor of **Večernji list** sat. It was precisely these organizational skills and the unique ambiance of the cafe that attracted Borghetti and Rašeta, who wanted to create a different format for political discussion. One of the guests of 'Kava Liberal' was the then-presidential candidate, **Zoran Milanović**. Domagoj, as the organizer, had the opportunity to ask him a question. He asked him why he wouldn't run for president, despite Milanović's then-stance that he was too old for that position. After the show, Domagoj and Milanović withdrew to the side and had a beer, where Domagoj further encouraged him to think about running. He emphasized the need for balance between the left and right in Croatia and the importance of an experienced figure like Milanović. Domagoj believes that with that conversation he prompted Milanović to think, which ultimately led to his candidacy and victory in the elections.

sections.subtitle: Budućnost 'Best Food Croatia' i gosti iz svih sfera života
sections.screenshot_description: Domagoj Delač najavljuje buduće goste i objašnjava koncept svoje emisije 'Best Food Croatia', koja spaja ozbiljne teme s gastronomijom.
sections.content:
Domagoj Delač najavio je svoju sljedeću gošću u emisiji **'Best Food Croatia'** – prvu hrvatsku premijerku, **Jadranku Kosor**. Emisija je već snimljena i uskoro će biti objavljena, a Domagoj ističe kako će gledatelji vidjeti gospođu Kosor u opuštenom izdanju, kako priča o svojim omiljenim jelima poput šufnudli i šmalca, ali i o ozbiljnim temama.  

Koncept emisije 'Best Food Croatia' podijeljen je u dva dijela: prvi dio posvećen je ozbiljnim pitanjima vezanim uz gosta, dok je drugi dio opušteniji, fokusiran na hranu i prehrambene navike. Domagoj je ponosan na dosadašnje goste, među kojima su bili **Anja Alavanja**, **David Skoko**, **Suzi Josipović**, **Hrvoje Kečkeš** i **Danko Ažić**. Posebno je istaknuo epizodu s Dankom Ažićem, koji je kroz šest likova valorizirao servirana jela.  

Domagoj naglašava da namjerno poziva ljude iz različitih sfera društva, kako bi ih prikazao na ljudskoj razini u normalnim situacijama, poput jela u restoranu. Njegov cilj nije kopirati klasične podcaste s milijardu pitanja, već pronaći balans između gastronomije i razgovora s gostima. Vjeruje u dugoročni uspjeh pozitivnog pristupa i odbacuje senzacionalizam, ističući da je upornost i poštenje ključno za izgradnju trajnog projekta.

magisterium.assessment: Projekt koji povezuje različite sfere života promiče kulturu susreta i društvenu koheziju.
magisterium.enrichment: Dijalog i suradnja različitih aktera stvaraju 'mrežu društvenog dobra' koja nadilazi zbroj pojedinačnih interesa.
magisterium.assessment_en: Project which connects different spheres of life promotes the culture of encounter and social cohesion.
magisterium.enrichment_en: Dialogue and cooperation of different actors create 'a network of social good' which surpasses the sum of individual interests.

sections.subtitle_en: Future of 'Best Food Croatia' and guests from all spheres of life
sections.screenshot_description_en: Domagoj Delač announces future guests and explains the concept of his show 'Best Food Croatia', which combines serious topics with gastronomy.
sections.content_en: Domagoj Delač announced his next guest on the show **'Best Food Croatia'** – the first Croatian prime minister, **Jadranka Kosor**. The show has already been filmed and will be released soon, and Domagoj emphasizes that viewers will see Ms. Kosor in a relaxed edition, talking about her favorite dishes like šufnudle and šmalc, but also about serious topics. The concept of the show **'Best Food Croatia'** is divided into two parts: the first part is dedicated to serious questions related to the guest, while the second part is more relaxed, focused on food and eating habits. Domagoj is proud of the previous guests, among whom were **Anja Alavanja**, **David Skoko**, **Suzi Josipović**, **Hrvoje Kečkeš**, and **Danko Ažić**. He particularly highlighted the episode with **Danko Ažić**, who, through six characters, evaluated the served dishes. Domagoj emphasizes that he intentionally invites people from different spheres of society, in order to present them on a human level in normal situations, such as eating in a restaurant. His goal is not to copy classic podcasts with a billion questions, but to find a balance between gastronomy and conversations with guests. He believes in the long-term success of a positive approach and rejects sensationalism, emphasizing that persistence and honesty are crucial for building a lasting project.

iterations.theme_en: Humanitarian work, political thoughts and future of the project
